question: Implement a `Time` class with private attributes `hours`, `minutes`, and `seconds` (all integers). Overload the `==` operator to compare two `Time` objects for equality (i.e., they represent the exact same time).
errors: The overloaded '==' operator incorrectly compares only hours and minutes, ignoring seconds. This leads to false positives when two Time objects have different seconds but identical hours and minutes.
